documentation.file_docstring: Tests for TwitchClientManager class Tests cover: - Client connection and reconnection - Message handling (chat) - Message sending with rate limiting - Disconnection scenarios - Error handling and edge cases
inline_comments: Mock functions that track handlers and return unbind objects

Implementation strips oauth: prefix from all tokens

disconnect doesn't throw, just does nothing

so multiple connections may be created. This is expected behavior.
